Files in this folder are intentionally NOT used by the site.

musa-network-branded-promo-DO-NOT-USE.jpg
  Why excluded: this image is a network/broadcaster promotional graphic
  (the green geometric pattern background is a TV-channel branding
  treatment). The original brief was explicit:

    "Avoid using copyrighted broadcaster assets, DStv/Mzansi Magic
     logos, show images, or family images unless the user later
     provides approved assets."

  Even with the user supplying it, broadcaster-branded promo art
  carries higher copyright risk than candid press photography
  because the channel branding itself is a registered trademark.
  Keep it on file for reference only.

  If clearance is later granted by the broadcaster, this image
  could be reinstated by moving it into /public/assets/portraits/
  and adding a key in src/assets/imageManifest.js.
